name: Great Potato Bread (1.5# & 1#)
recipeInstructions:
1. Load ingredients into the bread basket according to your machine's instructions.
Note: I used 2 teaspoons of yeast for the 1 1/5 lb loaf in my Hitachi machine. The recipe calls for 2 tsp only in Panasonic/National machines.
The nutritional information provided is not part of the core recipe and has been excluded.
